title: 湖邊的安靜時刻
lyrics_text:
[verse]
湖畔長椅上，他放鬆了身心

輕風拂面，心靈得以洗淨

午後的光，如此愜意
[chorus]
在這個時刻，找到幸福與平和

讓心靜下來，感受生命之美

寧靜湖水旁，享受此刻的寧靜
[end]
genre_prompt: female Cantonese Melancholic Classical airy vocal Piano bright vocal Pop Nostalgic Violin
lyrics_format_warnings: ["Line 3 is a blank line not followed by a section tag.", "Line 5 is a blank line not followed by a section tag.", "Line 9 is a blank line not followed by a section tag.", "Line 11 is a blank line not followed by a section tag.", "Missing blank line before [chorus] at line 7.", "Missing blank line before [end] at line 13.", "Section [verse] has 3 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [chorus] has 3 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [verse] has 3 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [chorus] has 3 lyric lines; expected 4."]
